action.description: The committee(s) on WAM recommend(s) that the measure be PASSED, WITH AMENDMENTS and be recommitted.  The votes in WAM were as follows: 11 Aye(s): Senator(s) Dela Cruz, Moriwaki, DeCoite, Hashimoto, Inouye, Kanuha, Lee, C., Richards; Aye(s) with reservations: Senator(s) Elefante, Wakai, Fevella ; 0 No(es): none; and 2 Excused: Senator(s) Kidani, Kim.
